formulas.formula: Cash and cash equivalents plus Marketable securities plus Accounts receivable net plus Inventories plus Prepaid expenses and other current assets equals Total current assets
components: Prepaid expenses and other current assets
formulas.operation: Cash and cash equivalents + Marketable securities + Accounts receivable, net + Inventories + Prepaid expenses and other current assets

formulas.formula: Total current assets plus Property and equipment net plus Operating lease assets plus Goodwill plus Intangible assets net plus Deferred income tax assets plus Other assets equals Total assets
formulas.operation: Total current assets + Property and equipment, net + Operating lease assets + Goodwill + Intangible assets, net + Deferred income tax assets + Other assets

formulas.formula: Accounts payable plus Accrued and other current liabilities plus Short-term debt equals Total current liabilities
formulas.operation: Accounts payable + Accrued and other current liabilities + Short-term debt

formulas.formula: Total current liabilities plus Long-term debt plus Long-term operating lease liabilities plus Other long-term liabilities equals Total liabilities
formulas.operation: Total current liabilities + Long-term debt + Long-term operating lease liabilities + Other long-term liabilities

formulas.formula: Preferred stock plus Common stock plus Additional paid-in capital plus Accumulated other comprehensive income loss plus Retained earnings equals Total shareholders equity
formulas.operation: Preferred stock + Common stock + Additional paid-in capital + Accumulated other comprehensive income (loss) + Retained earnings

formulas.formula: Total liabilities plus Total shareholders equity equals Total liabilities and shareholders equity
Total assets equals Total liabilities and shareholders equity

formulas.formula: Net income plus non-cash adjustments plus working capital changes equals Net cash provided by operating activities
components: Realized and unrealized (gains) losses on investments in non-affiliated entities, net
Net cash provided by operating activities
formulas.operation: Net income + Stock-based compensation expense + Depreciation and amortization - Realized and unrealized (gains) losses on investments in non-affiliated entities, net + Deferred income taxes + Other - Accounts receivable - Inventories - Prepaid expenses and other assets + Accounts payable + Accrued and other current liabilities + Other long-term liabilities
formulas.result_label: Net cash provided by operating activities

formulas.formula: Investing inflows minus investing outflows equals Net cash used in investing activities
components: Proceeds from maturities of marketable securities
Proceeds from sales of marketable securities
Purchases related to property and equipment and intangible assets
Net cash used in investing activities
formulas.operation: Proceeds from maturities of marketable securities + Proceeds from sales of marketable securities - Purchases of marketable securities - Purchases related to property and equipment and intangible assets - Acquisitions, net of cash acquired - Investments in non-affiliated entities
formulas.result_label: Net cash used in investing activities

formulas.formula: Financing inflows minus financing outflows equals Net cash used in financing activities
components: Proceeds related to employee stock plans
Payments related to repurchases of common stock
Payments related to tax on restricted stock units
Principal payments on property and equipment and intangible assets
Net cash used in financing activities
formulas.operation: Proceeds related to employee stock plans - Payments related to repurchases of common stock - Payments related to tax on restricted stock units - Dividends paid - Principal payments on property and equipment and intangible assets
formulas.result_label: Net cash used in financing activities

formulas.formula: CFO plus CFI plus CFF equals Change in cash and cash equivalents
components: Net cash provided by operating activities
Net cash used in investing activities
Net cash used in financing activities
Change in cash and cash equivalents
formulas.operation: Net cash provided by operating activities + Net cash used in investing activities + Net cash used in financing activities
formulas.result_label: Change in cash and cash equivalents

formulas.formula: Cash at beginning plus Change equals Cash at end
components: Cash and cash equivalents at beginning of period
Change in cash and cash equivalents
Cash and cash equivalents at end of period
formulas.operation: Cash and cash equivalents at beginning of period + Change in cash and cash equivalents
formulas.result_label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of period

xbrl_not_on_statement.reason: Supplemental cash flow disclosure for operating leases in Note 2, not a separate line on the cash flow statement face
Non-cash supplemental disclosure in Note 2 for operating lease assets obtained in exchange for lease obligations

cross_statement_checks.check: Net income on IS matches Net income starting CF
Ending cash on CF matches Cash on BS (current period Apr 28 2024)
Beginning cash on CF matches Cash on BS (prior period Jan 28 2024)
Retained earnings change on BS equals Net income minus Dividends minus Share repurchases charged to retained earnings
cross_statement_checks.note: From the equity statement: Net income 14881 less dividends 98 less share repurchases charged to retained earnings 8002 (the 8035 total repurchase was split 33 to APIC and 8002 to retained earnings) = 6781. Retained earnings went from 29817 to 36598, change of 6781.

operating_leases.current_location: Hidden inside Accrued and other current liabilities on the balance sheet face; disclosed in Note 9 accrued liabilities breakout under Operating leases line item with XBRL tag us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiabilityCurrent = 246; confirmed by OperatingLeaseLiabilityCurrentStatementOfFinancialPositionExtensibleList pointing to AccruedLiabilitiesCurrent

depreciation_and_amortization.note: CF statement shows a single line Depreciation and amortization of 410. Note 8 discloses intangible amortization of 143 as a component within the 410 total.

accounts_payable.note: Balance sheet shows Accounts payable separately as us-gaap:AccountsPayableCurrent = 2715. It is not combined with accrued liabilities on the face.

accounts_receivable.note: Balance sheet shows Accounts receivable, net as us-gaap:AccountsReceivableNetCurrent = 12365. No combination with other receivables indicated.

capex.note: CF line Purchases related to property and equipment and intangible assets = 369 using us-gaap:PaymentsToAcquireProductiveAssets. The financing activities line Principal payments on property and equipment and intangible assets = 40 (nvda:PaymentsForFinancedPropertyPlantAndEquipmentAndIntangibleAssetsFinancingActivities) represents financed purchases, a supplemental non-cash item. Intangibles are included in the capex line per label.

acquisitions.note: Single acquisition line on CF: Acquisitions, net of cash acquired = 39. Note 12 mentions approximately 1.2 billion in commitments to complete business combinations subject to closing conditions but not yet paid.

components.label: 0.584% Notes Due 2024 (current portion of long-term debt)

short_term_debt.note: Short-term debt of 1250 is the current portion of the 0.584% Notes Due 2024. No commercial paper outstanding as of April 28 2024 per Note 11.

sbc.note: CF addback us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensation = 1011. Note 3 breakout by function: Cost of revenue 36, R&D 727, SGA 248, Total 1011. Note that the APIC credit for stock compensation per equity statement is 1019 (AdjustmentsToAdditionalPaidInCapitalSharebasedCompensationRequisiteServicePeriodRecognitionValue) which differs from the CF addback of 1011 due to amounts capitalized into inventory.

interest_expense.source: Income statement shows Interest expense separately as 64 (us-gaap:InterestExpense) and Interest income separately as 359 (us-gaap:InvestmentIncomeInterest). These are gross amounts on the face of the income statement, not netted. Net = 359 income minus 64 expense = 295 net income.

tax_rate.note: Tax expense 2398, pretax income 17279. Effective rate = 2398/17279 = 13.88% per XBRL fact us-gaap:EffectiveIncomeTaxRateContinuingOperations = 0.139 (13.9%). Pretax income is positive, no fallback needed.

inventory.note: Note 9 provides inventory breakdown: Raw materials 1991, Work in process 1625, Finished goods 2248, Total 5864. Confirmed by XBRL facts InventoryRawMaterialsNetOfReserves, InventoryWorkInProcessNetOfReserves, InventoryFinishedGoodsNetOfReserves.

formula_checks.formula: Revenue minus Cost of revenue equals Gross profit
Research and development plus Sales general and administrative equals Total operating expenses
Gross profit minus Total operating expenses equals Operating income
Interest income minus Interest expense plus Other net equals Other income expense net
Operating income plus Other income expense net equals Income before income tax
Income before income tax minus Income tax expense equals Net income
Cash and cash equivalents plus Marketable securities plus Accounts receivable net plus Inventories plus Prepaid expenses and other current assets equals Total current assets
Total current assets plus Property and equipment net plus Operating lease assets plus Goodwill plus Intangible assets net plus Deferred income tax assets plus Other assets equals Total assets
Accounts payable plus Accrued and other current liabilities plus Short-term debt equals Total current liabilities
Total current liabilities plus Long-term debt plus Long-term operating lease liabilities plus Other long-term liabilities equals Total liabilities
Preferred stock plus Common stock plus Additional paid-in capital plus Accumulated other comprehensive income loss plus Retained earnings equals Total shareholders equity
Total liabilities plus Total shareholders equity equals Total liabilities and shareholders equity
Total assets equals Total liabilities and shareholders equity
Net income plus non-cash adjustments plus working capital changes equals Net cash provided by operating activities
Investing inflows minus investing outflows equals Net cash used in investing activities
Financing inflows minus financing outflows equals Net cash used in financing activities
CFO plus CFI plus CFF equals Change in cash and cash equivalents
Cash at beginning plus Change equals Cash at end
